languages.text: "Как ты определил, что Триасомату нужно сотворить из этих троих?"
"How did you decide to create a Triasomata out of these three?"
languages.original_text: "Как ты определил, что Триасомату нужно сотворить из этих троих?"

traits.locale_text: "How did you decide to create a Triasomata out of these three?"
"How did you decide to create a Triasomata out of these three?"
"How did you decide to create a Triasomata out of these three?"

languages.text: 「この3つからトライアソマタを作ることにしたのか？」
languages.original_text: "How did you decide to create a Triasomata out of these three?"

traits.locale_text: 「この3つからトライアソマタを作ることにしたのですか？」

languages.text: “你为什么会选择用这三个人来创造三相体？”
languages.original_text: "How did you decide to create a Triasomata out of these three?"

traits.locale_text: “你为什么会选择用这三个人来创造三相体？”

languages.text: «¿Por qué decidió crear un triasómata a partir de estos tres?».
languages.original_text: "How did you decide to create a Triasomata out of these three?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué decidió crear un triasómata a partir de estos tres?».

languages.text: "Wie kamt Ihr darauf, aus diesen Dreien einen Triasomata zu schaffen?"
languages.original_text: "How did you decide to create a Triasomata out of these three?"

traits.locale_text: "Wie kamt Ihr darauf, aus diesen Dreien einen Triasomata zu schaffen?"

languages.text: « Pourquoi avez-vous choisi ces trois hommes pour créer un Triasomata ? »
languages.original_text: "How did you decide to create a Triasomata out of these three?"

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi avez-vous choisi ces trois hommes pour créer un Triasomata ? »

languages.text: "Bu üçünden bir Üçyeköz yaratmaya nasıl karar verdiniz?"
languages.original_text: "How did you decide to create a Triasomata out of these three?"

traits.locale_text: "Bu üçünden bir Üçyeköz yaratmaya nasıl karar verdiniz?"
